work.title: AI Engineer Masterarbeit
work.location: BMW & Deutsches Forschungszentrum für Künstliche Intelligenz (DFKI)
work.description: **Topic**: *Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems: A Synthetic Benchmark Generation Approach*. Architected a modular evaluation framework for **multi-turn, tool-augmented Agentic RAG systems**, enabling fine-grained failure localization. Built a **stateful, multi-turn synthetic benchmark pipeline** that pairs deterministic task planning with diverse user personas to simulate complex user behaviors. Engineered an **unsupervised retrieval engine optimized** to audit RAG system **accuracy and latency** across **4M unannotated** enterprise records.

work.title: AI Research Engineer Werkstudent
work.description: Designed **and deployed** a **Knowledge-Graph-Augmented RAG (KG-RAG)** system and an autonomous **Planning Agent** over unstructured technical documentation using **LangChain** and **HuggingFace**. Developed an **Autoencoder architecture** for real-time anomaly detection across distributed edge devices **orchestrated via Federated Learning**. Developed a **Digital Twin** system using **PLCs**, **MQTT**, and **Node-RED**. Built a Model Context Protocol (**MCP**) bridge to connect natural language queries to a live database via an agent.

work.title: Big Data Platform Engineer
work.description: Engineered and optimized automated **CI/CD testing pipelines** and custom internal tooling to streamline the deployment of large-scale **big data clusters** on **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)**. Maintained robust automation frameworks within the Big Data Service team under **Oracle Analytics**, significantly reducing deployment overhead and improving system reliability.

work.title: Data Science & Analytics Intern
work.description: Developed a high-accuracy **predictive anomaly detection algorithm** specialized in identifying external battery replacements. Engineered **scalable** time-series data pipelines using **PySpark** to ingest and process raw vehicle telemetry and cloud logs. Optimized data flows and **imputed missing features**, increasing data reliability and driving a **62% increase** in backend service utilization. **Architected an interactive loop** via a **Streamlit dashboard** allowing users to adjust predictive parameters and receive real-time system performance outputs in **< 8 seconds**. Applied various advanced visualization and analytical techniques to isolate patterns in failing vehicle components, leveraging insights to target precise vehicle recalls.

work.title: Site Reliability Engineer
work.description: Managed **distributed server infrastructure**, established service monitoring telemetry, and streamlined engineering deployment workflows. Built a scalable API management platform, integrating secure payment and subscription systems using **Next.js**, **Stripe**, and **Docker**. Maintained a text analytics model for message categorization, benefiting clients.

work.title: Production Engineering Fellow
work.description: Selected internationally among 120 out of 20,000 applicants. Automated end-to-end **CI/CD workflows** using **GitHub Actions** for efficient, containerized deployment to production environments. Implemented system-wide metric monitoring dashboards using **cAdvisor**, **Prometheus**, and **Grafana** to ensure **99.99% uptime** hosted on an **AWS EC2** instance.

work.title: Data Engineer
work.description: Used mathematical and statistical techniques over data to isolate the most important features and create ML models that generate predictions as well as valuable insights. Created custom sales forecasting and data analytics **ML pipeline endpoints** using **Flask** and **Facebook Prophet**.

work.title: Full Stack Developer
work.description: Built an enterprise **ERP platform from scratch** to handle multi-module operations (inventory, human resources, logistics, and finance) utilizing **Angular**. Developed platforms for COVID tracking and digital marketplaces using **Capacitor**, **TypeScript**, **Cordova**, **SQL**, and **Flask**.

education.title: MSc. Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
education.description: Coursing degree. **Key Coursework:** _Statistics | ML Cybersecurity | NLP | Machine Translation | Image Processing & Computer Vision_. **Master Thesis (Grade 1.0):** Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems (In collaboration with BMW & DFKI).

education.title: BSc. Computer Science
education.description: Grade: 94.6 / 100. Five times best software engineering GPA. **60% tuition** scholarship due to academic merit. **Key Coursework:** _ML | Time series | Algorithms & Optimization | Cloud Computing & Distributed | Automation & PLC | Vehicle User Interfaces_

education.title: Computer Science Exchange Student
education.description: **Full scholarship** recipient from **DAAD**. **Key Coursework:** _Computer Vision II | Autonomous Driving and Assistance Systems | Statistics_

education.title: Technologist in Automation and Robotics
education.description: **Thesis:** Autonomous Tennis Machine - Engineered a PLC-programmed automated system featuring PID-driven speed and position control systems. **Key Coursework:** _Theory & Control Laboratory (I & II) | Industrial Robotics | PLCs | Digital Electronics | Controllers Laboratory | Sensor Systems_.
